scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/main.js --target=node --external electron && bun build src/preload.ts --outfile dist/preload.js --target=node --external electron && bun build src/renderer.ts --outfile dist/renderer.js --target=browser && cp src/index.html dist/index.html && cp src/renderer.css dist/renderer.css
